rationale: The citing paper appears to reference Mende et al. (2019) only as a background example in the General Discussion when suggesting future research on perceived threat and anxiety in technology-mediated interactions. It is not used to build the core attribution-based hypotheses, operationalizations, or empirical tests in the article. The paper's main framing and evidence rely on attribution theory and prior algorithm-decision studies, so this citation serves a passing contextual role.
